scripts.makemigration:sqlite: pnpm _env:dev pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --create-only --schema=./migrations/prisma/sqlite/schema.prisma
scripts.migrate:sqlite: pnpm _env:dev pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema=./migrations/prisma/sqlite/schema.prisma
scripts.makemigration:mysql: pnpm _env:dev pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --create-only --schema=./migrations/prisma/mysql/schema.mysql.prisma
scripts.migrate:mysql: pnpm _env:dev pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema=./migrations/prisma/mysql/schema.mysql.prisma
scripts.makemigration:postgres: pnpm _env:dev pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --create-only --schema=./migrations/prisma/postgres/schema.postgres.prisma
scripts.migrate:postgres: pnpm _env:dev pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema=./migrations/prisma/postgres/schema.postgres.prisma
scripts.build-adminforth: cd ../adminforth && npm ci && npm run build && npm link
scripts.migrate:all: pnpm migrate:sqlite && pnpm migrate:mysql && pnpm migrate:postgres && pnpm migrate:clickhouse
scripts.setup-dev-demo: pnpm preinstall && pnpm check-docker && pnpm check-task && pnpm build-adminforth && cp .env.local .env && pnpm install-plugins && pnpm install-adapters && pnpm install && pnpm link adminforth && bash ./scripts/run_inventory.sh
